zh.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Venables於1296年出生在英國爾金德頓時，他的父親Hugh de Venables40歲，母親Agatha de Vernon16歲。他於1315年與Elizabeth de Mobberley在英國爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1378年在英國英格蘭爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1368年10月22日在他的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Venables was born in 1296, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, his father, Hugh de Venables, was 40 and his mother, Agatha de Vernon, was 16. He married Elizabeth de Mobberley in 1315, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1378, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 22 October 1368, in his hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Venables est né en 1296, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Vernon, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Mobberley en 1315, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1378, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 22 octobre 1368, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Venables 1296 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Venables 40 und seine Mutter Agatha de Vernon 16. Er hat 1315 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England Elizabeth de Mobberley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1378 ist sein Beruf als sheriff in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Oktober 1368 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth de Mobberley nel 1315, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ko.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Venables(이)가 1296년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Agatha de Vernon(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1315년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 Elizabeth de Mobberley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1378년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1368년 10월 22일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Venables nasceu em 1296, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agatha de Vernon, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Mobberley em 1315, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1378, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1368, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Venables родился в 1296 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Vernon, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Mobberley в 1315 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1378 году он работал по профессии sheriff в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 22 октября 1368 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Venables nació en 1296, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agatha de Vernon, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Mobberley en 1315, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1378, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1368, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
